Unknown1:
You must be level 90 or above to participate in a variant dungeon. If you are below the duty level, you will be **level synced** accordingly.

Upon completing a variant dungeon while level synced, you will be awarded **experience points** in place of Allagan tomestones.

You have unlocked **variant dungeons (advanced)**, which can be accessed by switching the tab at the top of the V&C Dungeon Finder window.

In variant dungeons (advanced), you will **fight the bosses** from the corresponding variant dungeon in the order of your choosing. After each individual battle, you will have the option to complete the duty.

**Two variant actions can be selected for use** in variant dungeons (advanced).

Two to four players are required and **matching will be carried out to fill the party when registering alone**.
